_doc: Room-render arc (ckpt 130): the DECODE ground truth (args + EMIT SEQUENCE). 0x587e00 marks each room load (room_key/p2/p3/p4/dims); the emits that follow (0x58c910 emit_tile, 0x58ca80 emit_obj) until the next 0x587e00 are THAT room's decode output — the bit-exact gate for the ported map_decode arms.  RESOLVED ckpt 130: the cutscene room swap RE-RUNS 0x587e00 per room (town 0x334be@flip1434 / house 0x334c8@3671 / errands 0x334dc@4290), and param_3(local_918)=20(0x14) for all three (normalizes to 0).  All thiscall (ECX=grid); arg index N = param_(N+1).  Run: nix develop --command python3 tools/frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/control-path-gt/nav.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/map_decode_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --run-dir runs/room-render-gt/emit --duration-ms 240000

0x587e00.name: map_decode
0x587e00._note: FUN_00587e00(map=arg0, room[0x44]=arg1, local_918=arg2, room[0x43]=arg3), ECX=grid. Once per room load.

0x58c910.name: emit_tile
0x58c910._note: FUN_0058c910(x,y,slot,bank,frame,flag,p7,p8,p9,p10) thiscall ECX=grid. The map_grid_emit_tile ground truth: one row per placed base tile.

0x58ca80.name: emit_obj
0x58ca80._note: FUN_0058ca80(x,y,p3,p4,p5,p6,blend,p8,p9) thiscall ECX=grid. The map_grid_emit_obj ground truth: one row per object-block placement.
